# LLMs.txt for Pragvo Advisors

## Website Overview

Pragvo Advisors LLP is a senior-led strategic advisory firm at the intersection of capital strategy and human talent, focused on institutional clients and growth leaders in India.

## Site Structure

- Hero (`/`): Strategic capital and HR advisory value proposition
- About Us (`/#about`): Firm positioning, 80+ years HR depth, bespoke philosophy; cross-border lens and partner-led velocity
- Our Identity (`/#identity`): Trusted, Independent, Unwavering pillars
- Services (`/#services`): Core Domains — Investment Banking and HR Advisory (detailed cards per offering)
- Industries (`/#industries`): Sectors and industries served
- Team (`/#team`): Leadership team and strategic advisors (bios)
- Track Record (`/#track-record`): Public statistics and scale indicators
- Contact (`/#contact`): Location, phone, email, schedule consultation, legal links
- Privacy Policy (`/privacy-policy`), Terms of Service (`/terms-of-service`)

## Core Services (same titles and order as on-site)

### Investment Banking

- Debt Capital Markets: Bonds, private credit, syndicated loans, hybrid and ESG-linked financing, liability management
- Equity Capital Markets: IPO execution, follow-ons, block trades, PIPEs, convertibles, cross-border listings
- Mergers & Acquisitions: Buy-side and sell-side, carve-outs, cross-border, special situations

### HR Advisory

- Talent Acquisition: Executive search, specialist and volume hiring, cross-border / international recruitment
- Talent Development: Leadership programs, coaching and mentoring, succession planning
- Organization Design: Operating models, role architecture, governance frameworks
- HRIS Implementation Support: Vendor selection, configuration, migration, deployment, adoption
- Performance Management: OKRs, feedback systems, calibration
- Compensation & Rewards: Benchmarking, incentives, total rewards
- Leadership, Coaching & Mentoring: Acceleration programs, executive coaching, mentorship ecosystems
- Culture Transformation: Diagnostics, behavioral alignment, strategic change
- Organizational Effectiveness: Leadership alignment, talent assessment, employee experience
- Corporate Events & Leadership Offsites: Events, retreats, strategy offsites, team engagement
- Corporate Gifting & Employee Engagement Solutions: Gifting, recognition, employer branding, milestones and celebrations

## Track Record (matches on-page figures)

**Investment Banking**

- Aggregate Transaction Value: ₹7,000 Cr+
- Advisory Experience: 40+ Yrs
- Successful Mandates: 40+
- Indian Markets Covered: 100%

**HR Advisory**

- Advisory Experience: 70+ Yrs
- Successful Mandates: 50+
- Indian Markets Covered: 100%

## Tech Stack (representative)

- Frontend: React 19.x, TypeScript 5.9.x, Vite 7.3.x
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4.x, Framer Motion 12.x
- Icons: Lucide React
- Typography: Inter

## Contact

- Phone: +91 93111-42495
- Email: info@pragvo.in
- Location: New Delhi, India
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/pragvo-advisors
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/pragvo-advisors

## Key Differentiators

- Senior partner-led IB transactions and HR advisory engagements (no delegation to junior staff)
- Conflict-free independence
- Cross-border reach with local regulatory and cultural context
- Lean structure for execution speed
